name: breez_sdk_sparkFFI
summary: Low-level bindings to the Breez Spark SDK Rust API
description: Pinned to the 0.14.0 GitHub release asset. The upstream CocoaPods trunk only publishes the 0.11.0-dev2 FFI binary, but the BreezSdkSpark Swift bindings from tag 0.14.0 reference symbols only present in the 0.14.0 xcframework. Replace this file with the upstream trunk pod once Breez publishes a matching breez_sdk_sparkFFI pod version.
